sections.paragraph:
προαύλιον, ου, τό (Themist., Or. 33 p. 443, 13 fig. τὸ πρ. τοῦ λόγου) place in front of a house, forecourt, gateway (Pollux 1, 77; 9, 16; Suda) Mk 14:68.—M-M.

Themist Themist , IV a.d.—List 5

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 865
